planMd:
# Plan: Expand Listening Exercises with More Questions

## Summary

Increase the length and number of questions in generated listening exercises

## Tasks

1. Analyze current listening exercises structure in apps/web/src/features/listening/data/exercises.ts
2. Design additional question templates for listening exercises (depends on: Analyze current listening exercises structure in apps/web/src/features/listening/data/exercises.ts)
3. Expand existing listening exercises with additional questions in apps/web/src/features/listening/data/exercises.ts (depends on: Design additional question templates for listening exercises)
4. Update listening exercise rendering components to support new question types (depends on: Expand existing listening exercises with additional questions in apps/web/src/features/listening/data/exercises.ts)
5. Add automated tests for new listening question types and expanded exercises (depends on: Update listening exercise rendering components to support new question types)

# Final Report

" completed. 5/5 tasks completed.
